t_ch: 历史数据库播放完毕。
t_en: Historical database recording playback complete.

t_ch: 请允许我向此行丹轮寺所有殉道的僧侣致哀。
t_en: Please allow me to mourn for all the monks of Claretwheel Temple martyred on this journey.

t_ch: 我希望给奢摩一次演武仪典重赛的机会，让所有人见证丹轮寺的步离人同样拥有所有人类拥有的美好品质。
t_en: I hope to give Samatha a chance to compete once again in the Wardance, to let all witness that Claretwheel Temple's borisin also possess similarly admirable qualities as the rest of humanity.

t_ch: 仙舟刚刚经历了步离人的渗透突袭，我无法在如此敏感的时刻允许奢摩重获资格，登台参赛。
t_en: The Xianzhou were just victimized by a borisin raid. I cannot restore Samatha's contestant qualifications and allow a rematch during such sensitive times.

t_ch: 一旦她登上擂台，显露出自己的身份。等待她的将不只是云骑的围剿，还有所有观众对丹轮寺的恐惧。这真的是你们想要的结果吗？
t_en: Once she gets in the ring and reveals her identity, it won't just be a circle of armed Cloud Knights that awaits her. The audience will also become terrified to the name of Claretwheel Temple. Is that truly the outcome you wish?

t_ch: 不用我提醒，你们也应该明白，人们无法相信步离人可以改变自己残暴的本性。
t_en: I need not remind you, as you probably understand too — people do not simply believe that the borisin can disengage from their brutal nature just like that.

t_ch: 我明白…我一直都明白！但是我不甘心！驮那师父、毗梨护法，还有善逝……他们为了这次旅行献出了一切！
t_en: I understand... I always have! But I refuse to give up! Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata... They gave everything for this journey!

t_ch: 我想站在擂台上告诉所有人，丹轮寺的僧侣没有败给自己的本性！
t_en: I want to stand on the ring and tell everyone that the monks of Claretwheel Temple have not caved in to their nature!

t_ch: 逻辑：生于猎群则残暴，生于丹轮寺则良善。观点：「本性」是带有主观认知的伪命题。
t_en: Logic: To be born into the hunting pack is to be brutal, and to be born in Claretwheel Temple is to be compassionate. Perspective: "Nature" is a pseudo-proposition that contains subjective cognitive bias.

t_ch: 提问：倘若仙舟愿意接纳丹轮寺，给予步离人改变自己的环境，他们还会走入血火的轮回吗？
t_en: Question: If the Xianzhou agrees to admit Claretwheel Temple and provide an environment that allows the borisin to change themselves, would they still walk into the cycle of war and bloodshed?

t_ch: 抱歉，你的问题，我无法回答。
t_en: I apologize. I am unable to give an answer to your question.

t_ch: 仙舟不愿意相信丹轮寺，也不给予他们表达的机会，如此一来，矛盾将永不消解，血火轮回将常在。
t_en: The Xianzhou is unwilling to believe Claretwheel Temple, while depriving them of a chance to speak their case. Thus, conflict will never dissipate, and the cycle of war and bloodshed will be ever-present.

t_ch: 驭空女士，虽然我已不是丹轮寺的僧人，但为了达成奢摩的愿望，我将向您展示我的决心——
t_en: Madam Yukong, even though I'm not a Claretwheel Temple monk any longer, I will henceforth demonstrate my resolve to you to achieve Samatha's wishes...

t_ch: 警告，警告，幽囚狱内所有的金人均失去控制，控制台无回应。
t_en: Warning, warning. All aurumatons in the Shackling Prison have lost control. The control station is unresponsive.

t_ch: 失控金人正在缩小包围圈，请求支援，请求——喂？喂！该死，通讯系统也……
t_en: The out-of-control aurumatons are tightening their encirclement. Requesting reinforcements. Requesting — Hello? Hello! Damnations, even the comms...

t_ch: 全体进入戒备状态！再重复一次，全体进入戒备状态！
t_en: Get into high alert, everyone! I repeat, high alert!

t_ch: 智械…你想做什么？
t_en: Intellitron... What do you intend to do?

t_ch: 在历史已无法追溯的年代，反有机方程引领的帝国曾占领了大半个宇宙，作为鲁珀特帝国的尖兵，我，是帝皇意志的延伸。
t_en: In an era forgotten by history and drowned in time, the empire that the Anti-Organic Equation ushered in once extended across more than half of the universe. As an elite soldier of the Rubert Empire, I am an extension of the Emperor's will.

t_ch: 这股力量，足以污染、操控此地的一切机械，命它们将有机生命尽数碾为齑粉。
t_en: This power is sufficient to corrupt and control all machines in this area, commanding them to grind all organic life to fine dust.

t_ch: 但我想要展示的，并非是杀戮的意愿。因为在杀戮之上，我已寻得更伟大的力量……
t_en: But what I wish to demonstrate is not the intent to slaughter. Because beyond that, I have always found an even greater power...

t_ch: ……永远都会有选择，而我将选择更好的。
t_en: ...There will always be a choice, and I will make that better choice.

t_ch: 死战举烽火，受戒持金锁。身世生杀尽予夺，遍修恶缘结善果。
t_en: In deadly battle, we raise the beacon's blaze. Under command, we hold the golden binding's embrace. In life, I have claimed and taken other lives, wandering through karma's web for sin to turn into fortune.

t_ch: 自性竟如何？缘起皆是我。本来虚妄尽无着，休道谁人性秽浊。
t_en: What is the nature of oneself? All karma traces back to one's decision and will. For all things are born with emptiness and neutral void. Do not call any being born filthy or tainted.

t_ch: 在高频超载的尖啸声中，所有的机械造物从被反有机方程的诅咒操控中得到了释放。
t_en: In a high-pitched screech of overload, all mechanical creations are freed from the control of the Anti-Organic Equation's curse.

t_ch: 尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>「善逝」，熔断了自己的回路，归于空寂。
t_en: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak> "Sugata" has blown their own circuits and fallen silent once more.

t_ch: 善逝？
t_en: Sugata?

t_ch: 歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！
t_en: Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate!

t_ch: …你有没有感觉到，盔甲上的机巧零件，它们僵住了……
t_en: ...Do you feel that, the intricate ingenia on the gray armor... They're frozen...

t_ch: 当生存压力超过一定阈值，有机生命的身体会选择错误的策略，他们封闭自我，失去声音，放弃知觉，甚至不再思考。
t_en: Once the pressure for survival exceeds a certain threshold, organic bodies may adopt incorrect strategies. They may isolate themselves, lose their voice, relinquish awareness, and even cease to think.

t_ch: 而后，刺耳的轰鸣将你的意识叩响，带着机械帝国的号角，与流淌了上千个琥珀纪的血与火。
t_en: And then, a piercing roar strikes your consciousness, carrying with it the horn of the Machine Empire, as well as the blood and fire that had flowed for over a thousand Amber Eras.

t_ch: 驭空大人，我不是仙舟人，不知道过去发生了什么，没法对你们的决定指手画脚。
t_en: Madam Yukong, I am not a Xianzhou native, and I don't know what happened here in the past, so I cannot point fingers at your decision.

t_ch: 但我作为参赛选手，我不想接受这场不战而来的胜利。
t_en: But, as a contender, I cannot accept a victory that was not earned in battle.

t_ch: 就像善逝先生说的，哪怕最后没有接受请愿，也不该剥夺他们表达的权力。
t_en: Just like Mr. Sugata said, even if the petition is ultimately rejected, they should not be denied the right to express themselves.

t_ch: 善逝已经把他的声音传达到了我们所有人心里。
t_en: Sugata has already made his voice heard by all of us.

t_ch: 不过，我还想要看到另一个人的决心。
t_en: However, I still wish to see the resolve of another person.

t_ch: ……只要能达成请愿，我可以献出一切。
t_en: ...As long as the petition is complete, I will offer everything I have.

t_ch: 奢摩，在竞锋舰的下层擂台，我会为你和卢卡安排一场重赛。和你期待的不同，这场比斗没有观众的欢呼，也不会有掌声，罗浮仙舟上没有任何人会知道这次比赛的结果。
t_en: Samatha, I will arrange your rematch with Luka in the Skysplitter's lower-floor arena. It will be different from what you hoped — there will no bustling cheers of spectators, nor will there be raucous applause. No one on the Xianzhou Luofu will know the outcome of this match.

t_ch: 要是你能赢得胜利，罗浮仙舟会重新考虑丹轮寺的请愿。
t_en: If you can take victory, the Xianzhou Luofu will consider Claretwheel Temple's petition.

t_ch: 奢摩…谢过驭空大人。
t_en: I... thank you, Madam Yukong.

t_ch: 准备好了，就开始你们的比赛吧。
t_en: You can start your match when you're ready.

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 先休息下。
t_en: Get a bit of rest.

t_ch: 驭空很快派人清理了赛场，空寂的擂台上，只能听见一阵阵心跳声。
t_en: Yukong quickly sends people to clean up the stage. Amid the deafening silence, only the sound of heartbeats can be heard.

t_ch: 二位施主，请原谅，我即将向你们展示身为步离人的凶相。
t_en: Patrons, please forgive me, for I am about to display the ferocious visage of the borisin.

t_ch: 这并非是为了杀戮或者胜利，只是希望有人能听见一座小小寺庙的坚持，知晓这一路请愿僧众的艰辛，还有一万三千名平民渴望活下去的执念。
t_en: We do this in the name of neither slaughter nor victory. We simply wish for people to learn of the perseverance of a small temple. We wish for everyone to know of the hardships of our petitioning monks, as well as the desperate determination of <unbreak>13,000</unbreak> civilians to survive.

t_ch: 护法僧毗梨、智众经师驮那、皈依弟子善逝，及修行僧奢摩，请卢卡施主赐教！
t_en: Dharmic Monk Virya, Revered Master Dhyana, Converted Disciple Sugata, and Revered Monk Samatha, humbly beseech Patron Luka for guidance!

t_ch: 我明白奢摩小姐的心意，我也会全力以赴，这场战斗，是我对所有丹轮寺僧的敬意。
t_en: I understand Miss Samatha's intentions. I will give my best, for this battle is to show my respect to all the monks of Claretwheel Temple.

t_ch: 比赛到此为止吧！
t_en: Halt the duel!

t_ch: 等等…我还没赢！贫僧还可以继续战斗！只有赢得胜利，才能让仙舟听见丹轮寺的声音……
t_en: Wait... I have not won! I can still fight! Only with my victory will the Xianzhou be able to hear the voices of Claretwheel Temple...

t_ch: 奢摩，你已尽力了。仙舟不是演武仪典的擂台，我们倾听的不止是胜利者的声音。我代表罗浮仙舟认可了你的决心。
t_en: Samatha, you've already tried your best. The Xianzhou is not an arena for the Wardance ceremony. We do not only listen to the voices of victors. I represent all of the Xianzhou Luofu in recognizing your determination.

t_ch: 丹轮寺的请愿，会成功吗？
t_en: Will the petition of Claretwheel Temple be successful?

t_ch: 我会让景元将军与奢摩对谈一次。同时我也会在六御议事时为丹轮寺尽力陈情。对于丹轮寺的请愿，我无法做出肯定或否定的答复。
t_en: I will let General Jing Yuan have a conversation with Samatha. Also, I will try my best to give a full account and support the Claretwheel Temple during the Six Charioteers' meeting. Regarding Claretwheel Temple's petition, I cannot give a definite answer.

t_ch: 只要有一线希望，我可以一直等待。
t_en: As long there's a glimmer of hope, I will wait.

t_ch: 希望奢摩小姐的等待不会太久。
t_en: I hope that Miss Samatha won't have to wait long.

t_ch: 虽然驮那师父、毗梨护法和善逝看不见了……但我希望我能代替他们见证这一天的到来，见证丹轮寺的僧侣和孩子们可以不再忧惧，可以在这个宇宙的一角找到自己和平生活的地方。
t_en: Although Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata can no longer witness it... I hope I can witness it on their behalf — the day when the monks and children of Claretwheel Temple will know no fear and find a tranquil corner in the cosmos to lead peaceful lives of their own.

t_ch: 奢摩，这也是所有仙舟住民们的愿望啊。
t_en: Samatha, this is also the wish of all the people on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 这样的日子会来的……一定会来的！
t_en: Such a day will come... It definitely will!

t_ch: 两位，请允许贫僧暂时告退收殓善逝的遗骸。在这场旅行的尾声，我希望将它和它的戒环葬在一个有希望的地方……葬在这里。
t_en: My friends, please allow me to excuse myself to gather and bury Sugata's remains. At the end of this journey, I wish to bury it together with its commandment ring in a place of hope... I wish to bury it here.

t_ch: 这位对手，看上去似乎不像是格斗家……
t_en: This opponent, really does not look like a fighter...

t_ch: 怎么说呢，比起希儿或者托帕小姐那样的对手，她给我的感觉，更像是娜塔莎大姐头。
t_en: How do I put this... compared to opponents like Seele or Miss Topaz, the feeling she gives me, feels more like Lady Boss Natasha.

t_ch: 小瞧狐人会吃大亏的。
t_en: You'll lose out if you underestimate foxians.

t_ch: 也是，仙舟处处卧虎藏龙，以貌取人可不行——就让我好好期待一下吧。
t_en: Indeed, there are hidden masters everywhere on the Xianzhou, and you can't judge a book by its cover. I shall look forward to it.

t_ch: 检测到进程被人为中断…即将重新同步数据。
t_en: Human intervention in the process has been detected... Initiating data resynchronization.

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 波长调整完毕，更改内存权限，联觉信标同步开始。
t_en: Wavelength adjustment complete. RAM access permissions altered. Synesthesia Beacon synchronization initiated.

t_ch: 容我再休息一下。
t_en: Please allow me to rest.

t_ch: 选手休息室里都安放了这样的战术板。卢卡选手是资深运动员了，应该已经很了解了吧？
t_en: All the contestants' lounges have been outfitted with such Tactics Board. Luka, you're an experienced athlete. I'm sure you're very familiar with this?

t_ch: 嗯。不过贝洛伯格的战术板比较简陋，没有这里的这么高科技。
t_en: Yep. But Belobog's Tactics Board are a little shoddier than this, not as technologically advanced.

t_ch: 用起来还是大同小异的啦！我们就用这块战术板来简单介绍一下星天演武仪典的赛程吧～
t_en: They're all the same when you use them! Let's use this Tactics Board here to give you a simple brief of the Luminary Wardance's itinerary!

t_ch: （看向战术板）
t_en: (Look towards the Tactics Board)

t_ch: 么么～么么！
t_en: Mehr, mehr! Mehr, mehr!

t_ch: 抱起梦貘，进入梦乡。
t_en: Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.

t_ch: 么～么！
t_en: Mehr, mehr!

t_ch: 等等再试吧。
t_en: Let's try it later.

t_ch: 么？
t_en: Mehr?

t_ch: 最新一期的「罗浮体育报」出来了，我来看看有什么精彩报道。
t_en: The latest edition of Luofu Sports Illustrated is out. Let's see what exciting news is in store.

t_ch: （查看「罗浮体育报」）
t_en: (Check Luofu Sports Illustrated)

t_ch: 这帮记者还真的什么都往里写啊，看来下次得注意发言了。
t_en: These journalists really will sensationalize anything and everything. Gotta watch my words next time.

t_ch: 不看报我还真不知道，原来这场比赛的影响这么大。
t_en: I wouldn't have known if I didn't read the paper — the ripple effect of this tournament is much larger than I expected.

t_ch: 这届小编是懂流量的，标题取的一个比一个唬人。
t_en: This bunch of editors really are clickbait connoisseurs — each header is more explosive than the last.

t_ch: 这期报道写得太好了，把我都看感动了。
t_en: This article is beautifully written. I could almost cry!

t_ch: 卢卡应该回休息室了，在附近稍微转转就去找他吧。
t_en: Luka should be back at the lounge now. Let's take a walk nearby and look for him.

t_ch: 两位，我们来一起看看下场擂台赛的对手信息吧。
t_en: Folks, let's take a look at the opponent's profile for the next Faceoff Match.

t_ch: （看向战术板）
t_en: (Look towards the Tactics Board)

t_ch: 一幅摄影作品，摄制于距今七百年前，展现了仙舟联盟与贝洛伯格之间不朽的友谊。
t_en: A photograph taken seven hundred years ago, depicting the enduring friendship between the Xianzhou Alliance and Belobog.

t_ch: 人类像一株巨树般彼此紧密相联，不断滋长。人们塑造历史，历史造就英雄，英雄鼓舞着未来，而未来又诞生出全新的人们。
t_en: People are like a giant tree, closely intertwined and ever-growing. People shape history, history creates heroes, heroes inspire the future, and the future brings forth new people.

t_ch: 第一场叩关赛大获成功！卢卡选手觉得怎么样？
t_en: The first knockout match comes to a triumphant close! How do you feel, Luka?

t_ch: 还不错！逐渐找到感觉了！
t_en: Not bad! I'm starting to get into my groove!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，当教练的感觉如何？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how does it feel, being the coach?

t_ch: 还挺轻松的。
t_en: It's pretty chill.

t_ch: 真不愧是传说中的银河球棒侠！
t_en: Spoken like the legendary Galactic Baseballer!

t_ch: 还挺累的。
t_en: It's pretty tiring.

t_ch: 哈哈，真是辛苦你啦，教练！
t_en: Haha, you've worked hard, coach!

t_ch: 和自己上场没啥区别。
t_en: It feels no different from fighting in the ring myself.

t_ch: 是呀！这可不是一个轻松的差事～
t_en: That's right! It's not some walk in the park!

t_ch: 接下来可以稍微休整一下。然后咱们就回休息室，在战术板那里讨论一下，接下来该打哪位对手吧～
t_en: We have time to take a short break. Let's return to the lounge and decide which opponent to fight next at the Tactics Board!

t_ch: 嗯！现在状态正好，我要趁热打铁，赢得更多胜利！
t_en: Yeah! I'm on a roll, so I've gotta keep my momentum going and score more wins!

t_ch: 首场擂台赛就拿下了开门红，应该能给卢卡增强信心。
t_en: Getting off to such a great start in his first Faceoff Match should give Luka a confidence boost.

t_ch: 不过卢卡的幻觉越来越严重了，得想个办法解决……
t_en: Although, Luka's hallucinations have been getting more and more intense. I have to think of a way to stop them...

t_ch: 卢卡也有支持者了，真是件好事。
t_en: Luka has his own supporters now, and this is wonderful news.

t_ch: 不妙啊不妙，波提欧直接把卢卡信心打没了。
t_en: Ah, this is bad! Boothill just completely shattered Luka's confidence!

t_ch: 现在只能寄希望于复活赛，但愿一切顺利吧。
t_en: Now we'll just have to place our hopes on the repechage and pray everything goes well.

t_ch: 观众们好像对这场比赛的评价还挺高的，卢卡的人气又上涨了。
t_en: It looks like the spectators enjoyed this match. Luka's popularity is on the rise again.

t_ch: 为了不让支持我们的人失望，卢卡，一定要振作起来啊。
t_en: You have to get it together, Luka. Do it for everyone supporting us!

t_ch: 真好呀，卢卡重新振作起来了！
t_en: Amazing, Luka's pulled himself together!

t_ch: 之后得好好感谢一下尾巴大爷和藿藿！
t_en: I'll have to thank Mr. Tail and Huohuo properly for their help!

t_ch: 我们居然有这么多粉丝了，这下真成大名人了。
t_en: I can't believe we have so many fans. We're a big deal now!

t_ch: 卢卡这一场打得真漂亮，连我都对他的成长感到惊讶。
t_en: Luka handled that round beautifully. Even I'm shocked at his growth!

t_ch: 无论最后的结果怎样，卢卡都让整个银河认识了贝洛伯格。
t_en: No matter what final result he ends up with, Luka has made everyone in the cosmos aware of the name "Belobog."

t_ch: 看来大家都很关注卢卡的决赛，我们一定要拿出最好的状态。
t_en: It looks like there are a lot of people keeping an eye out for Luka's final. We have to make sure he's in top condition!

t_ch: 作为教练，这次我要把压箱底的战术拿出来了。
t_en: As his coach, I'm going to pull out some of my secret tactics for this match.

t_ch: 小东西，你竟然还有这神奇的本领…仙舟可真不可思议啊！
t_en: Such a little thing bursting with so much wondrous ability... The Xianzhou is certainly full of surprises!

t_ch: 么？么么么！
t_en: Mehr? Mehrmehrmehr!

t_ch: 这梦貘有用吗？
t_en: Does this tuskpir do anything?

t_ch: 比我想象中还神奇！
t_en: It's more amazing than I thought!

t_ch: 么么么！
t_en: Mehr mehr mehr!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，你学得还挺像。
t_en: Hahaha, you sure learn quick.

t_ch: 我刚才抱着这只梦貘小睡了一会儿，竟然在睡梦中打了一场极其逼真的战斗！对付一只三米长的大蟑螂！
t_en: I hugged this tuskpir and took a nap just now, and I dreamt I was fighting a battle that felt super real! It was against a giant cockroach three meters long!

t_ch: 难道这梦貘，还能用来进行战斗训练？
t_en: Could this tuskpir be used for combat training?

t_ch: 么么！么！么么！
t_en: Mehr mehr! Mehr! Mehr mehr!

t_ch: 真的吗？让我试试！
t_en: Really? Lemme try!

t_ch: 唔…搞不好是因为我有病在身，才触发了梦貘的特殊习性？也许对你无效？我也不知道啦，你自己试试看好了。
t_en: Hmm... Maybe it's because I'm sick, and that triggered the tuskpir's special trait? Maybe it doesn't work on you? I don't know. You should give it a shot.

t_ch: 梦貘呆呆地看着你，看起来快要睡着了。
t_en: The tuskpir stares at you blankly, looking like it's about to doze off.

t_ch: 只要抱着它睡觉，就能在梦中体验真实的战斗？这是什么匹诺康尼青春版？
t_en: One can experience hyperrealistic battles in a dream just by hugging it when falling asleep? What kind of Penaconian daydream is this?

t_ch: 么么～么么么！
t_en: Mehr mehr! Mehrmehr mehr!

t_ch: 抱起梦貘，进入梦乡。
t_en: Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.

t_ch: 么～么！
t_en: Mehr! Mehr!

t_ch: 你抱起梦貘，席地而坐，闭上双眼，准备体验一下这传说中的「梦境战斗训练」。
t_en: You pick up the tuskpir, sit on the floor, and close your eyes — you are ready to experience this fabled Dreamscape Combat Training.

t_ch: 但有个问题…你现在一点都不困。况且就算再怎么困，也不太可能在朋友（卢卡）期待的注视中安然睡着吧？
t_en: A slight problem though... You aren't sleepy at all right now. And even if you are, you can't possibly go to sleep under the eager gaze of your friend Luka, can you?

t_ch: 不对劲…一阵困意突然袭来，你的意识缓缓远去。梦貘…真是神奇的动物啊……
t_en: Something's off... A sudden wave of drowsiness hits you, and your consciousness starts drifting away. The tuskpir... sure is a wondrous creature...

t_ch: 你刚才一瞬间就睡着了！怎么样？体验到逼真的战斗了吗？
t_en: You dozed off immediately! How was it? Did you get to see any hyper-realistic battles?

t_ch: 这是便携式匹诺康尼啊！
t_en: This is practically a portable Penacony!

t_ch: 最近一直听人提到这个地名，看来等以后我也要去一次了～
t_en: I keep hearing the name of that place. Looks like I'll have to go visit it too!

t_ch: 还挺逼真的。
t_en: It was pretty realistic.

t_ch: 真神奇啊…仙舟联盟……
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance... Is truly amazing...

t_ch: 么！么么么～么么！
t_en: Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr, mehr mehr!

t_ch: 看来之后，我确实可以用这只可爱的小梦貘来完成一些危险系数高的训练。
t_en: Seems like I can definitely use this cute little tuskpir to complete some danger-zone training.

t_ch: 不止卢卡，你也可以利用这只可爱又无私的小动物，来在梦中完成一些高难度的战斗。梦貘是很温柔的动物，非常喜欢帮助人类。
t_en: It's not just Luka, even you can use this adorable benevolent critter to simulate really challenging combat scenarios while dreaming. The tuskpir is an exceptionally gentle animal that loves helping humans out.

t_ch: 么么！么！
t_en: Mehr mehr! Mehr!

t_ch: 恭喜卢卡选手获得比赛的胜利，感谢卢卡选手的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
t_en: Congratulations to Luka for winning this match! And thank you to his coach, {NICKNAME}, for accepting this interview.

t_ch: 到场的各位记者朋友请在会场中找到合适位置，保持距离，并请按照流程准备好提问。
t_en: To the journalists who have arrived at the site, please situate yourselves appropriately, maintain your distance, and get your questions ready according to procedure.

t_ch: 现在开始由{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问，请注意控制发言时长。
t_en: We're now ready for Coach {NICKNAME} to answer some questions from journalists. Please keep your responses brief.

t_ch: 前排左手边第一位。
t_en: Front row, first from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: 我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。{NICKNAME}教练，首先祝贺你和卢卡选手，真是一场精彩的比赛！
t_en: Carmella, Interastral Peace Entertainment. Firstly, congrats to both you and Luka, Coach {NICKNAME}. It was a thrilling fight!

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: （目光表示感谢）
t_en: (Give an appreciative look)

t_ch: 我注意到「铁臂」卢卡选手的状态火热，最后也是靠着火热的状态战胜了对手。不过，我们发现卢卡选手比赛中途好像是些神情恍惚，据说是看到了幻觉……
t_en: I've noticed that Luka "Strongarm" is on a hot streak — something he eventually used to gain the upper hand and oust his opponent. But, we've noticed that midway through the match, Luka appeared somewhat dazed, like he is experiencing hallucination...

t_ch: 对于「幻觉」一事，不知道{NICKNAME}教练是如何看待这件事的？
t_en: Regarding this hallucination, I wonder if Coach {NICKNAME} has any comments?

t_ch: 嗐，看到幻觉不全是坏事…
t_en: Eh, hallucinations aren't all that bad...

t_ch: 运动员在训练过程中常常会有那种「假想敌训练」。据我所知，有人通过幻想与等身高的螳螂格斗锻炼自己，所以，卢卡在比赛之中看到幻觉不全是坏事。
t_en: Athletes do plenty of image training in their regiments. As far as I know, some even train by visualizing themselves to fight mantises that are as tall as them. So it's not entirely a bad thing for Luka to see hallucinations during fights.

t_ch: 想象不同的对手，对手如何出招，以及自己如何应对，都是经常有的事。卢卡早已习惯如此，请各位朋友们不必担心。
t_en: Imagining different opponents, how they will strike, and how you will counter them — these are all common occurrences. Luka has long been accustomed to such situations, so everyone need not worry.

t_ch: 似乎是他压力过大的原因…
t_en: It appears to be because he's under a lot of stress...

t_ch: 大家都知道卢卡选手是第一次离开自己的母星「雅利洛•Ⅵ」，到仙舟来参加比赛，难免会有些精神紧张，在这个状态下看到幻觉也不意外。
t_en: Everyone knows that this is Luka's first time leaving his home planet, Jarilo-VI, to participate in the tournament on the Xianzhou. It's normal for his nerves to get to him, and not surprising for him to be seeing things under duress.

t_ch: 接下来他会接受丹鼎司全面的检查，并调整状态，请各位朋友不必担心。
t_en: He will be undergoing a full medical inspection at the Alchemy Commission to attune his mental state, so everyone need not worry.

t_ch: 据我所知，卢卡没有幻觉…
t_en: From what I know, Luka does not hallucinate...

t_ch: 据我所知，卢卡选手并没有产生幻觉。这是谣言，请大家放心。
t_en: From what I know, Luka has not been hallucinating. That's just a rumor, so please be at ease.

t_ch: 原来如此——感谢你的回答！
t_en: I see... Thank you for your answer!

t_ch: 那么，后来我注意{NICKNAME}教练及时作出了战术调整，最后正是因为这次调整，卢卡选手一举获胜，请问教练有什么可以分享的吗？
t_en: Later on, I noticed Coach {NICKNAME} making a tactical change, and it is because of this change that Luka won. Is there anything you can share regarding this?

t_ch: 我其实什么也没做…
t_en: I actually didn't do anything...

t_ch: 我其实什么也没有做，这就是卢卡选手的实力。
t_en: I actually didn't do anything. That was all Luka.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练真是太谦虚了！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME} is too modest!

t_ch: 战术调整要看准时机…
t_en: It's all about opportunity when you revise your strategy...

t_ch: 合理的战术调整是需要看准时机的，这就是教练之间的博弈。
t_en: It's all about precise timing when it comes to tactical adjustments. This is the clash between coaches.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练真是太厉害了！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME} is amazing!

t_ch: 我感觉是对手变弱了…
t_en: I think it's the opponent who was too weak...

t_ch: 有这样的事情吗？我只是正常比赛而已，可能是对手变弱了吧。
t_en: Oh? I did such a thing? I was just competing like I always do. Maybe it was the opponent who was too weak.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练真是太狂了！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME} is so brazen!

t_ch: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
t_en: All right. That's it for your questions.

t_ch: 前排左手边第二位。
t_en: Front row, second from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练，我是仙舟精武新闻网特邀记者桂乃芬。首先要恭喜你啊！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}, Xianzhou Martial Elite Network special correspondent, Guinaifen here. First off, congrats on the win!

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: …那是什么新闻网？
t_en: ...What news network again?

t_ch: 人家给我发记者证，你就别问那么细了。
t_en: Someone gave me a journalist pass, so just take it and run, alright?

t_ch: 赛前很多人预测卢卡会输掉这场比赛，没想到最后卢卡选手作为大黑马赢下了比赛。对于那些赛前没有看好你们的媒体，{NICKNAME}教练，有什么话要说吗？
t_en: Many predicted that Luka would lose the match, yet Luka clinched the win in the end as the underdog. To those media outlets that didn't favor your odds, Coach {NICKNAME}, do you have anything to say to them?

t_ch: 建议还是别做媒体了…
t_en: I'd suggest you all quit the media industry...

t_ch: 就他们这种预测水平，我建议还是不要做媒体了。
t_en: With such amateur forecast analysis like theirs, I think they should just quit the industry.

t_ch: 说实话那也不怪他们呀…
t_en: Honestly, I can't blame them...

t_ch: 倒是不能怪他们，只怪咱们的卢卡选手隐藏了实力。
t_en: Can't say I blame them. Our Luka just hid his prowess really well.

t_ch: 我无话可说…
t_en: I'm speechless...

t_ch: 还要说什么吗？我觉得不用说什么，大家心里都清楚。
t_en: What else is there to say? I don't think there's a need. It's quite clear in everyone's minds.

t_ch: 真不愧是我认识的{NICKNAME}教练，说话就是有水平！
t_en: That's the Coach {NICKNAME} I know. Such poise!

t_ch: 不过我看网上不少网友评论，就卢卡选手赛程前半段和后半段的表现来看，就像是两个人一样…甚至有人提出应该严查卢卡选手是否使用违禁药物。
t_en: But many netizens have commented that Luka seemed like two different people, from his performance in the first and second halves... There are some who even suggest that Luka should be subjected to a doping test.

t_ch: 关于这点，{NICKNAME}教练有什么需要澄清的吗？
t_en: Regarding this point, would Coach {NICKNAME} like to clarify?

t_ch: 查就查，谁怕谁啊！
t_en: He'll do it! We're not afraid of the truth!

t_ch: 赛前赛后卢卡选手都是接受过药物检查的，还用得着他们提出？卢卡选手是名值得尊敬的参赛选手，我只能说「事实胜于雄辩」。
t_en: Luka was subjected to drug tests both before and after the competition, is there any need to have it done again? Luka is a respectable contestant, and all I can say is, "facts speak louder than words."

t_ch: 赛场上的成长不可估量…
t_en: Potential growth in a fight is immeasurable...

t_ch: 网友们的惊讶是可以理解的。不过对于处在成长期的卢卡选手来说，赛场是最适合突破自己的舞台，他在激烈的交锋中再次实现了进化！
t_en: The surprise is understandable. But to Luka, who is constantly growing as a fighter, the ring is the perfect stage for him to surpass his own limits. He spontaneously evolved right in the middle of his intense clash!

t_ch: 我没有什么要澄清的…
t_en: There's nothing to prove...

t_ch: 我没有什么要澄清的，这就是「卢卡式胜利」。我不过是做了些微不足道的工作罢了。
t_en: I have nothing to clarify. That was a victory in Luka's image. All I did was menial work.

t_ch: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
t_en: All right. That's it for your questions.

t_ch: 前排左手边第三位。
t_en: Front row, third from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: 我是来自《周刊闻椿》的记者，我司奉行保护个人隐私的原则…所以我也就不方便透露自己的名字了，各位请称呼我为「八卦记者」就好。
t_en: I'm a journalist from Weekly Wenchun. Our company adheres to the principle of protecting our personal privacy, which is why I can't reveal my name. Feel free to just call me "that Tabloid Journalist."

t_ch: 首先恭喜卢卡选手获得胜利，我早就是卢卡选手的粉丝了！
t_en: First off, congratulations to Luka on the win. I'm an OG Luka fan!

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: …你不恭喜我吗？
t_en: ...You're not going to congratulate me too?

t_ch: 恭喜你，有这么厉害的选手，肯定什么也不用做吧。
t_en: Congrats, you probably don't even have to lift a finger with such a strong fighter under you.

t_ch: 其实我对比赛的事情不太感兴趣啦，主要是对卢卡选手比较在意…据说在「雅利洛•Ⅵ」时，卢卡选手和托帕女士就打过照面，两人渊源颇深……
t_en: I'm actually less interested in the tournament than I am in Luka... I hear that Luka and Lady Topaz met before on Jarilo-VI, and share some history...

t_ch: 请问{NICKNAME}教练，你如何评价这两人的私交？
t_en: I'd like to ask Coach {NICKNAME}: How do you see their relationship?

t_ch: 他们俩没有私交。
t_en: They're not in any relationship.

t_ch: 我必须要澄清一点，这俩人根本就没有私交。
t_en: I feel the need to clarify that they do not share any relationship.

t_ch: 真的吗？其实你是知道故意不说吧。
t_en: Really? Are you sure you're just trying to not out them?

t_ch: 我不方便评价。
t_en: It's not my place to comment.

t_ch: 这种事情与比赛无关，我只是教练，不方便评价。
t_en: This matter has nothing to do with the fight. I'm just here to coach. No comment beyond that.

t_ch: 哦，那说明真的有问题。
t_en: Oh, that means there's really a problem.

t_ch: 你应该去问他们。
t_en: You should go ask them.

t_ch: 这种事情你问我怎么评价？我不知道，你去问他们。
t_en: You're asking me about it? I don't know. Go ask them yourself.

t_ch: 嘁，那他们也不在这啊！
t_en: Tch, but they're not even here!

t_ch: 请你立刻出去。
t_en: Please remove yourself from the premises.

t_ch: 请你立刻出去！
t_en: Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!

t_ch: 怎么还急了？
t_en: Why so heated?

t_ch: 请这位「八卦记者」注意提问礼仪。
t_en: Might I remind the Tabloid Journalist to pay attention to your interview etiquette.

t_ch: 别急，我还有一个问题！有人目击到卢卡选手与一位自称「鼹鼠队老大」的女士共处一室，请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价？
t_en: Calm down. I have another question! Someone saw Luka and a lady who calls herself "boss of the Moles" share a room. How does Coach {NICKNAME} see this?

t_ch: 那是亲友团啊！
t_en: She's just here to support him!

t_ch: 你说的是虎克吧，那不是卢卡的「雅利洛•Ⅵ」亲友团吗？
t_en: You mean Hook? Isn't she a friend of Luka's from Jarilo-VI?

t_ch: 嘁，没劲。
t_en: Tsk, boring.

t_ch: 那就是个小屁孩！
t_en: That's just a kid!

t_ch: 你说的是虎克吧，那不就是个乳臭未干的小屁孩吗？
t_en: You mean Hook? You mean that brat who still reeks of mother's milk?

t_ch: 小孩姐啊？没劲。
t_en: It's a kid? How boring.

t_ch: 选手休息室也叫共处一室？
t_en: Sharing a room? You mean the lounge for contestants, right?

t_ch: 在选手休息室，也算是共处一室，你们还有没有底线了？
t_en: Insinuating the lounge like it was a bedroom, have you no morals?

t_ch: 选手休息室那个？哦，小孩姐啊，没劲。
t_en: It's the contestants' lounge? Oh, and it's a kid too. How boring.

t_ch: 请你立刻出去。
t_en: Please remove yourself from the premises.

t_ch: 请你立刻出去！
t_en: Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!

t_ch: 急了急了急了！
t_en: Someone's getting upset!

t_ch: 你没有提问的机会了。
t_en: Your chance for any more questions is over.

t_ch: 现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}, please choose another journalist.

t_ch: 前排左手边第一位。
t_en: Front row, first from the left.

t_ch: 前排左手边第二位。
t_en: Front row, second from the left.

t_ch: 前排左手边第三位。
t_en: Front row, third from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
t_en: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.

t_ch: 例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
t_en: Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.

t_ch: 下一场比赛的对手是…让我看看……
t_en: The next opponent is... Let's see...

t_ch: 星核猎手？？？而且是那个传说中最暴力、最凶残、最冷酷的萨姆？？？
t_en: A Stellaron Hunter??? And it's SAM, said to be the most violent, brutal and the cruelest of them all???

t_ch: 走，卢卡选手，我们去办退赛手续。这场绝对不能打。
t_en: Come on, Luka, time to fill out the tournament forfeiture form. You absolutely cannot fight in the next round.

t_ch: 等等，卡美丽小姐…这萨姆是什么来路？怎么突然要拉着我退赛了？
t_en: Hang on, Miss Carmella... Who is this SAM? And why are you suddenly pulling me out?

t_ch: 这人可能是最有名的通缉犯…细节等有机会再给你科普吧！现在的当务之急是退赛！这绝对不是开玩笑的事！
t_en: This guy could be the most wanted criminal of them all... I'll fill you in on the details later when we get the chance! It's imperative that we pull out of the tournament now! And I'm not in the least bit joking!

t_ch: 萨姆可能是来找我玩的。
t_en: SAM might be here to hang out with me.

t_ch: 找你玩…{NICKNAME}教练，你怎么跟谁都那么熟？
t_en: Hang out with... Coach {NICKNAME}, why do you know everyone?

t_ch: 你误会了，萨姆不是那种人。
t_en: You're mistaken. SAM isn't like that at all.

t_ch: 这还能有误会？我可看过不少公司针对星核猎手的安全培训视频，跟恐怖片似的，可吓人了！
t_en: Mistaken!? I've watched plenty of IPC safety training videos on Stellaron Hunters — they're no different from horror flicks! Terrifying!

t_ch: 你清醒点，这根本就不是萨姆。
t_en: Look closely, this isn't SAM at all.

t_ch: 身着钢铁盔甲、身形高大健壮、浑身散发着难以接近的强者气息…感觉基本上就是萨姆啊？
t_en: Clad in steel armor, towering and burly, bursting with an aura of absolute domination... That looks exactly like SAM?

t_ch: 我直接发短信问问萨姆吧。
t_en: I'll just send SAM a message to ask.

t_ch: 直接问…你们那么熟的吗？
t_en: Ask... Are you guys buddies or something?

t_ch: 教练，下次记得教教我，如何拥有横跨黑白两道的广阔人脉……
t_en: Coach, you've got to teach me your rizz with both the good and bad guys...

t_ch: 原来只是冒充星核猎手的笨蛋……
t_en: So it's just a fool impersonating a Stellaron Hunter...

t_ch: 幸好他们遇到的是卢卡选手，而不是真正的星核猎手，不然恐怕就不是「教训一下」那么简单了。
t_en: Luckily the one they met was Luka and not a real Stellaron Hunter. Otherwise, they probably wouldn't have gotten away with just a "lesson."

t_ch: 好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
t_en: All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
t_en: All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
t_en: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是风头正劲的明日之星——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: In this match, the two opposing sides are, the rising star — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 以及来自星核猎手的——「萨姆」！天啊，竟然是凶狠残暴的星核猎手！怎么办？卢卡选手！真的要面对如此恐怖的敌人吗？
t_en: And SAM — from the Stellaron Hunters! My goodness, I can't believe it's actually the savage and ruthless Stellaron Hunter! What are you gonna do, Luka? Are you going to face this terrifying opponent head on?

t_ch: 我听人说「萨姆」是一个人，但我对面怎么有三个「萨姆」？
t_en: I hear that SAM is only an individual, but why do I see three SAMs in front of me?

t_ch: 我们是「萨姆-量产型」。我是「初号机」。
t_en: We are the SAM Mass Production Models. I am Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>.

t_ch: 我是「二号机」。
t_en: I am Unit<unbreak>-02</unbreak>.

t_ch: 我是「三号机」。
t_en: I am Unit<unbreak>-03</unbreak>.

t_ch: 我们仨就是大名鼎鼎的星核猎手！平时最大的爱好就是战斗、毁灭、吃小孩！
t_en: The three of us are the infamous Stellaron Hunters! Our favorite hobbies include fighting, destruction, and devouring children.

t_ch: 哈哈哈！就问你怕不怕！
t_en: Hahaha! The question is, are you afraid?

t_ch: 现在投降还来得及！
t_en: You've still got time to surrender!

t_ch: 怎么？吓得不敢说话了？
t_en: What? Are you scared speechless?

t_ch: 感觉配合你们的对话，有点太侮辱智商了…咱们还是少说两句，用拳头来决胜负吧。
t_en: I feel like I'm losing brain cells just by talking to you... Let's cut to the chase and settle this with our fists.

t_ch: 呼呼哈哈！正合我意！
t_en: Hoohoohaha! My thoughts exactly!

t_ch: 哥哥哥，哥！别打了！我们认输！
t_en: Brother, bro—brother! Please stop hitting us! We surrender!

t_ch: 我们根本不是什么星核猎手，承受不住您这铁拳啊哥！
t_en: We aren't the Stellaron Hunters. We can't withstand your punches!

t_ch: 这身装备也是租来的，打坏了我们实在赔不起啊哥！
t_en: Our equipment is rented too. If it's damaged, we really can't afford to pay for it, bro!

t_ch: 你看看你们…为什么非要冒充别人呢？
t_en: Look at you guys... Why are you impersonating other people?

t_ch: 其实是我们直播间的粉丝说，我们三个身手很好，如果表演「萨姆模仿秀」，一定能成为「先天萨姆圣体」，赚到很多钱……
t_en: Actually, it was a fan in our live stream who said the three of us have great skills. If we perform a "SAM Impersonation Show," we'll definitely become the innate talent to become SAM and make bank...

t_ch: 直播模仿？先天圣体？尽是些我这种乡下人搞不懂的事……
t_en: Live stream impersonations? Innate talent? I'm from the boonies, and I don't really understand these...

t_ch: 总而言之，我的教练去问了萨姆本人，人家不喜欢被你们冒充。不要这么做了。你们总不想被星核猎手找上门吧？
t_en: Anyways, my coach has spoken to SAM. They don't like being impersonated by you guys. Please stop doing this. You don't want the real Stellaron Hunters to come knocking on your door, right?

t_ch: 一定一定！我们回去就换个直播赛道，再也不玩抽象了！
t_en: For real, definitely! We'll switch to another live-streaming track when we get back, no more playing with abstract stuff!

t_ch: 看起来大局已定～那么我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: Looks like the outcome is clear! Then allow me to declare, the winner of this match is Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: …总感觉直播网站上未来会冒出不少「先天卢卡圣体」。
t_en: ...I feel like the live stream platforms will have a lot more "innate talent" for Luka.

t_ch: 下场比赛的对手叫做…顿…顿派…菲昌英？这听着也太不像人名了。
t_en: The next opponent is called... Giga... Gigantus... Shieldus? That doesn't sound like a person's name at all.

t_ch: 也许来自我们不熟悉的文明圈。
t_en: Maybe they are from a civilization that we are not familiar with.

t_ch: 银河这么广阔，大概叫什么怪名字的都有。
t_en: The cosmos is so vast that it probably has all sorts of strange names.

t_ch: 可能是假名吧？
t_en: Maybe it's a fake name?

t_ch: 有可能哦。贝洛伯格也有很多格斗家会给自己起一个特别怪异的假名。
t_en: Maybe! In Belobog, there are many fighters that will give themselves weird names as well.

t_ch: 不过就算名字再怎么花哨，到了擂台上还是实力见真章。
t_en: No matter how flashy their names are, only true strength matters when you step into the arena.

t_ch: 让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
t_en: Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
t_en: Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!

t_en: Begin competition.

t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
t_en: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「铁盾」…顿派…顿派菲昌英！
t_en: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Iron Shield... Gigantus... Gigantus Shieldus!

t_ch: 是我出现幻觉了，还是你真的拿着银鬃铁卫的盾牌？
t_en: Am I hallucinating, or are you really carrying a shield from the Silvermane Guards?

t_ch: 这是我在跳蚤市场买回来的，感觉非常适合打造我的个人品牌。
t_en: I bought this from a flea market, and felt like it was suitable for creating my personal brand.

t_ch: 「『铁盾』顿派菲昌英！他的盾牌非常硬！」
t_en: "Ironshield" Gigantus Shieldus! His shield is gigantic!

t_ch: 原来你的名字是谐音梗啊…好尴尬。
t_en: So your name is actually a pun... That's awkward.

t_ch: 没错！是不是很精妙？
t_en: That's right! Isn't it ingenious?

t_ch: 呃…我们还是直接开打吧！
t_en: Err... Let's just start fighting!

t_ch: 「顿派菲昌英」这个个人品牌，我构思了整整一年，连训练都荒废了！没想到…还是敌不过你的铁臂！
t_en: I spent one whole year conceptualizing my personal branding "Gigantus Shieldus," and I even sacrificed my training! I can't believe... I still lost to your Iron Arm!

t_ch: 如果你把构思你那个破谐音梗的时间花在训练上，搞不好就打得赢了。
t_en: If you spent the time you used on conceptualizing those lame puns on training instead, you might actually have won.

t_ch: 可是，那样我就创造不出来现在这样具有记忆点的个人品牌了啊！如果不能成功炒作，能力再强又有什么用？
t_en: But if I do that, then I wouldn't be able to create an impactful personal branding that sticks! If I cannot successfully promote myself, what good is my strength?

t_ch: 唉…我感觉你们发达地区的媒体还是太厉害了，让很多人都产生了像你这样的错误认知。
t_en: *sigh* Personally, I think the media in developed regions like yours wield too much influence, so many people develop misconceptions similar to yours.

t_ch: 别整天惦记着什么破谐音梗、炒作、记忆点、个人品牌了！好好练武、好好打比赛，人们自然就会记住你的名字！
t_en: Stop obsessing over lame puns, hype, catchphrases, and personal branding! Train hard and fight harder, and people will naturally remember your name!

t_ch: 我在老家也算是个明星，你可以相信我，哥们——靠炒作成名的东西，最多只会火几个月。靠双拳打出来的声名，才是永远不会朽坏的。
t_en: I'm considered a star back in my home world. Trust me, buddy — things that rely on hype only stay popular for a few months. Fame earned through one's fists lasts forever.

t_ch: 真是精彩的演说！我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: What an exciting speech! I declare the winner of this match to be Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 下场比赛的对手是——「扑满战线」。这队名还挺有画面感，怪可爱的。
t_en: Our next opponent is... the Trotter Battlefront. This team name certainly does evoke an image, pretty cute.

t_ch: 扑满…听起来战斗力不是很强。
t_en: Trotter... They don't sound very strong.

t_ch: 不要小看扑满哦！
t_en: Don't underestimate the Trotters!

t_ch: 确实，不管对手是谁，都不应该轻敌。
t_en: That's right. Never underestimate your opponent, no matter who they are.

t_ch: 扑满最难打了。
t_en: Trotters are hardest to deal with.

t_ch: 确实，主要是跑得太快了，很难追得上。
t_en: Mainly because they're slippery and hard to catch.

t_ch: 以前师父训练我的时候，有一个项目就是在院子里徒手抓扑满…哈哈，没想到还真有能用上的一天！
t_en: Back when my master used to train me, one of the exercises was catching Trotters with my bare hands in the backyard... Haha, I never thought it would come in handy!

t_ch: 都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！
t_en: They say, "one shouldn't stoop to the level of a Trotter." But today I'll have to make an exception! Let's go!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！
t_en: They say, "one shouldn't stoop to the level of a Trotter." But today I'll have to make an exception! Let's go!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「扑满战线」！
t_en: In this match, the two opposing sides are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Trotter Battlefront!

t_ch: …希望扑满们没事！
t_en: ...Hope the Trotters are all right!

t_ch: 你为什么要带着这么多扑满参加比赛？我印象里，扑满并不是一种战斗力很强的生物。
t_en: Why do you need to bring so many Trotters to compete? My impression was that Trotters aren't really built for battle.

t_ch: 哼哼，因为我比扑满还要弱！
t_en: Heh-heh, because I'm weaker than Trotters!

t_ch: 扑满训练师用非常自豪的语气说出了莫名其妙的话！
t_en: Such confidence for such a strange confession, Trotter trainer!

t_ch: 呃…那…咱们开打吧？
t_en: Er... Right... Then let's begin our battle?

t_ch: 扑满兄弟们！上吧！去吞噬卢卡吧！
t_en: Trotter brothers! Go forth! Swallow up Luka!

t_ch: 对不起，扑满们，我没能带你们赢得胜利……
t_en: Sorry, my Trotters. I was unable to bring you guys a win...

t_ch: 扑满们围绕着训练师，似乎在说「没关系，你已经尽力了。」
t_en: The Trotters surround the Trotter trainer, as if saying, "It's okay. You've done your best."

t_ch: 带上我和扑满们的份，继续前进吧，卢卡。
t_en: Carry on our hopes with you and keep moving forward, Luka.

t_ch: 扑满们看着卢卡，眼神中充满了沉重的嘱托。
t_en: The Trotters look at Luka with doe-eyed expressions, their gaze full of heavy responsibility.

t_ch: 「扑满战线」突然开始煽情了！这剧情展开我怎么看不懂？是我错过了哪一集吗？
t_en: The Trotter Battlefront is suddenly trying to get everyone to catch some feels! How did the plot suddenly take a twist like this? Did I miss an episode?

t_ch: 嗯！谢谢你们！我一定会继续前进，不会让扑满们失望的！
t_en: Yes! Thank you all! I'll definitely keep advancing, and I won't disappoint the Trotters!

t_ch: 啊不是，你怎么还真跟着热血起来了？算了…总而言之！本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: Wait what, why are you suddenly getting fired up? Never mind... In conclusion, the winner of this match is — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 这场比赛的对手叫做…「朱明三不」。听名字感觉是什么大人物的绰号。你们了解这个对手吗？
t_en: The name of the next opponent is... the Tri-Dis of Zhuming. Just from the name, it seems like a nickname of some big shots. Do you guys know anything about the opponent?

t_ch: 我有所耳闻，「朱明三不」是朱明的三个民间武术家。这三个人虽然算不上绝顶高手，但也不可小觑。
t_en: I heard through the grapevine that the Tri-Dis of Zhuming comprise a trio of civilian martial artists from the Zhuming. Although these three might not be top-tier masters, do not underestimate them.

t_ch: 打得过我吗？
t_en: Can they beat me?

t_ch: 应该打不过吧？你还是有点太强了。
t_en: Probably not? You're kind of overpowered.

t_ch: 打得过你吗？
t_en: Can they beat you?

t_ch: 我的机械零件可承受不住太暴力的事！
t_en: My mechanical parts can't take too much of a beating!

t_ch: 打得过卢卡吗？
t_en: Can they beat Luka?

t_ch: 哈哈，等一下就知道了！
t_en: Haha, we'll find out in a bit!

t_ch: 「朱明三不」…仔细品了品，这名字还挺帅气的。该去擂台上会会他们了！
t_en: The Tri-Dis of Zhuming... After some appreciation, this name sounds quite impressive. It's time to go meet them in the arena!

t_en: Begin competition.

t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
t_en: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「朱明三不」——颓不流、贤不肖、何不乐！
t_en: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" against the Tri-Dis of Zhuming — D. Celerate, D. Valieu, and D. Lite!

t_ch: 卢卡，我们三个都很欣赏你的战斗意志。
t_en: Luka, all three of us admire your fighting spirit.

t_ch: 可惜，今天你注定要止步于此了。
t_en: Unfortunately, this is as far as you'll go.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahahahahaha!

t_ch: 何不乐！你别乐了！你搞得我们像反派似的！
t_en: D. Lite! Stop laughing! You're making us look like villains!

t_ch: 抱歉，我没绷住，哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Sorry, I just can't hold back, hahahahahaha!

t_ch: 卢卡，你别在意，这家伙没有嘲笑你的意思，他只是天生就爱笑。
t_en: Please don't mind him, Luka. He is not mocking you. He just naturally likes to cackle.

t_ch: 哼哼，别担心，他马上就乐不出来了！
t_en: Heh-heh, don't worry. He won't be cackling much after this!

t_ch: 我们就是欣赏你这一点。上吧！
t_en: This is what we admire about you. Bring it!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahahahahaha!

t_ch: 你*仙舟粗口*别乐了！
t_en: Stop *Xianzhou profanity* laughing!

t_ch: 真是酣畅淋漓的对决！是我们输了！
t_en: This is one thrilling and fulfilling duel! We've lost!

t_ch: 三位真是好身手！我也从这场战斗中学到了很多，感谢你们。
t_en: You three really have great moves! I've learned a lot from this battle as well. Thank you.

t_ch: 哪里哪里！我们才是受益良多。等我们三人的武功更精进一些后，万望能再度与你交手。
t_en: No no, the pleasure was ours! We've learned a lot from this. We hope to be able to spar with you again once we've improved our skills.

t_ch: 当然，我求之不得。
t_en: Of course, I can't wait.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahahahahaha!

t_ch: 真受不了……
t_en: Ugh, I can't take this...

t_ch: 颓不流给了何不乐一记手刀，后者的笑声戛然而止，晕倒在地。
t_en: D. Celerate delivers a karate chop to D. Lite, whose laughter abruptly ceases as he faints to the ground.

t_ch: 抱歉，我们回去会教育他的。
t_en: Sorry, we'll teach him a lesson once we get back.

t_ch: 哈哈！没什么啦！比武本就是开心的事，笑一笑也正常。
t_en: Haha! No biggie! Exchanging moves is a happy occasion. It's normal to have a laugh.

t_ch: 经过一场「欢声笑语」的对决，本场比赛的胜利者终于诞生！让我们恭喜——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: After a lively and cheerful duel, the winner of this match has finally emerged! Let us congratulate Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 尾巴大爷？他怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
t_en: Mr. Tail? Why is he here participating in the Wardance?

t_ch: 还给自己取了一个很奇怪的队伍名…「负业磷火」，听起来像仙舟幻想小说里的大妖魔……
t_en: Gave himself a very strange team name... Karmic Hinkypunk, sounds like a demon from a Xianzhou fantasy novel...

t_ch: 生活不易，尾巴卖艺。
t_en: Life is hard. Tail has to hustle.

t_ch: 不至于吧？十王司薪资待遇应该还可以。
t_en: Really? The salary at the Ten-Lords Commission shouldn't be too shabby.

t_ch: 可能他也有个武侠梦。
t_en: Maybe he also has a warrior's dream.

t_ch: 岁阳也会有这样的梦想吗？倒是也能理解啦。
t_en: Do heliobi have such dreams too? I can get behind that.

t_ch: 尾巴大爷对我有恩。不管他为何而参赛，我都会全力以赴——这是我对他的回报。我准备上场了！
t_en: I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!

t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_en: I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!

t_en: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「负业磷火」——尾巴——大爷！
t_en: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and Karmic Hinkypunk — Misterrrrr Tail!

t_ch: 尾巴大爷，你怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
t_en: Mr. Tail, why are you participating in the Wardance?

t_ch: 当然是来看看你的状态啊。你们人类管这叫什么来着？「诊后随访」，对吧？
t_en: I'm here to check on your condition of course. You humans call this "post-visit follow-up," right?

t_ch: 看你现在这生龙活虎的劲儿，本大爷的治疗应该还算成功。
t_en: Looking at how energetic you are, it seems like my treatment is working well.

t_ch: 嗯，我现在已经完全恢复状态了。真的很感谢你，尾巴大爷。
t_en: Yes, I've fully recovered. I'm truly grateful towards you, Mr. Tail.

t_ch: 停停停！都说了，本大爷最受不了别人谢我……
t_en: Stop stop stop! I already said, I can't stand people thanking me...

t_ch: 你恢复的怎么样，就让老子亲自复诊一下吧！准备好接招了吗？
t_en: I'll personally check on your recovery! Are you ready to catch these blows?

t_ch: 没问题！开始吧！
t_en: No problem! Let's begin!

t_ch: 打得相当不错嘛！看来本大爷的治疗很成功嘛～
t_en: Your moves are pretty impressive! Looks like my treatment is very successful.

t_ch: 那当然，毕竟你可是天下无敌的尾巴大爷！
t_en: Of course! After all, you are the invincible Mr. Tail!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，老子当然知道～
t_en: Heehee, that I know.

t_ch: 行了，老子溜了。你好好打比赛，我和藿藿都等着你杀入「竞锋守擂」的好消息呢。
t_en: Okay, I gotta go. You focus on your matches. Huohuo and I are both waiting for the good news of you making it to the "Ringmaster's Challenge."

t_ch: 这就走了？我们下场以后再聊聊天呗？
t_en: You're leaving so soon? Can we have a chat after we get off the arena?

t_ch: 不了。女鬼判官只允许我离开藿藿独自出来一个时辰，再不回去她要生气了。下次再约吧。
t_en: Nah. The Ghosty only allows me to leave Huohuo and come out alone for a dual-hour. If I don't go back soon, she's gonna flip. We'll meet again next time.

t_ch: 真是一场鬼气森森却气氛融洽的战斗啊…让我们恭喜「铁臂」卢卡，再次赢得了比赛的胜利！
t_en: What an eerie yet harmonious battle... Let us congratulate Luka "Strongarm" for winning the match once again!

t_ch: 接下来的对手叫做…「神奇植物在哪里」。听起来又是个很奇妙的对手呢。
t_en: The next opponent is called... Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them. Sounds like quite the character we have here.

t_ch: 说起来，我们老家那边基本没什么植物。来到罗浮以后，确实感觉到处都是「神奇植物」。
t_en: Come to think of it, our hometown doesn't have many plants. But after coming to the Luofu, it seems like there are fantastic botany everywhere.

t_ch: 但选手照片上的这些植物，是不是过于神奇了？
t_en: But aren't the plants in the competitor's photo a bit too fantastical?

t_ch: 这不是魔阴身吗！
t_en: Isn't this a mara-struck?

t_ch: 气氛逐渐「丰饶」了起来。
t_en: The atmosphere suddenly becomes more "Abundant."

t_ch: 别担心，你看，组委会特意帮他们标注了一下——
t_en: Don't worry. Look, the organizing committee has specially marked them...

t_ch: 「经检测，该队伍并未使用任何寿瘟祸祖之力量。一切安全合法，符合参赛规范。」
t_en: "After inspection, the team did not use any Plagues Author's powers. Everything is safe, legal, and compliant with competition regulations."

t_ch: 我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！
t_en: I honestly don't have much experience dealing with plants... Let's hope this match goes smoothly!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！
t_en: I honestly don't have much experience dealing with plants... Let's hope this match goes smoothly!

t_ch: 开始比赛。
t_en: Begin competition.

t_ch: 稍作准备。
t_en: Make some preparations.

t_ch: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
t_en: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

t_ch: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「神奇植物在哪里」！
t_en: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and — Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them!

t_ch: 组委会提示，「神奇植物在哪里」并未使用任何寿瘟祸祖的力量，也没有深陷魔阴——只是单纯长得比较「丰饶」而已！请放心观赛！
t_en: The organizing committee assures that "Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them" is not at all utilizing any Plagues Author's powers, nor are they direly afflicted with mara — they just look a bit "Abundant." Please watch this exciting bout without fear!

t_ch: 嗨，你好！你养的这些植物都挺好看的。
t_en: Hi, hello! These plants of yours are pretty.

t_ch: 我以前都不知道，植物竟然也能用来战斗，哈哈。大概因为我老家那边没什么像样的植物吧！
t_en: I never knew that botany could be used for combat, haha. Probably because there isn't much flora around where I live!

t_ch: …朋友，赛前稍微寒暄两句嘛。就算是对手，也没必要把气氛搞得那么僵硬吧？
t_en: ...Hey, it's just friendly banter before the match. Even if we're opponents, you don't have to be this wound up, do you?

t_ch: 你为什么，执着于，和植物对话？
t_en: Why. Are you. So. Insistent. On talking. To the plants?

t_ch: 呃…你是植物吗？我看你不是和我一样的人类吗？
t_en: Err... You're a plant? I thought you were human, just like me?

t_ch: 算了，咱们还是用拳头来交流吧！
t_en: Never mind, let's have a dialogue with our fists!

t_ch: 这场比赛真让我长见识啊！没想到植物也能有这么强的战斗力！
t_en: This match has certainly taught me something new! To think a plant would wreak so much havoc!

t_ch: …你完全不打算理会我是吧？
t_en: ...You're going to completely ignore me, eh?

t_ch: 抱歉，身为植物，不能说话。这是我的信念。
t_en: Apologies. I can't be talking, as a plant. This is my belief.

t_ch: 行吧…祝你早日如愿成为植物吧……
t_en: All right... I hope you'll get your wish and grow up to be a plant soon...

t_ch: 观众朋友们！快用欢呼和掌声掩盖住擂台上尴尬的气氛吧！你们的小叽米要受不了了！
t_en: My spectating friends! Quickly, use your cheers and applause to overwhelm the awkward air in the ring right now! I just can't take it any longer!

t_ch: 然后，把欢呼和掌声献给我们了不起的战士——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: And then, offer your cheers and applause to our most excellent fighter — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 很遗憾，卢卡选手在本场比赛中惜败给巡海游侠波提欧。接下来的新闻发布会，将由卢卡的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
t_en: Very sadly, Luka has been defeated by the Galaxy Ranger Boothill in this match. In the next press conference, Luka's coach {NICKNAME} will be accepting journalist questions.

t_ch: 被{NICKNAME}教练选到的记者将获得提问机会，请注意控制提问的时长。
t_en: Journalists selected by Coach {NICKNAME} will be given the chance to ask questions. Please keep your words brief.

t_ch: 那么请{NICKNAME}教练开始。
t_en: Now, Coach {NICKNAME}, please begin.

t_ch: 前排左手边第一位。
t_en: Front row, first from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。虽然比赛结果令人遗憾，但是总体来说这仍是一场精彩的比赛。
t_en: Hello Coach {NICKNAME}, Carmella from Interastral Peace Entertainment. While the match result was regrettable, overall it was still an exhilarating match.

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: （目光表示感谢）
t_en: (Give an appreciative look)

t_ch: 赛前许多分析师预测本场比赛会打得旗鼓相当，但出人意料的是，波提欧选手仅用六发子弹便结束了比赛。
t_en: Before the match, many analysts predicted that this could go either way. But what was surprising that Boothill ended the match with only six bullets.

t_ch: 请问{NICKNAME}教练，卢卡选手如此快速丢掉比赛的原因是什么？
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}, what was the reason Luka lost this match so quickly?

t_ch: 技不如人罢了…
t_en: Skill issue...

t_ch: 我们不想为自己找借口，如果实在要找一个理由，那就是我们还不够强。
t_en: We won't find excuses for ourselves. If I really had to find a reason, it was because we weren't strong enough.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练的回答非常坦诚。
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}'s answer is really candid.

t_ch: 卢卡吃坏肚子了…
t_en: Luka ate some bad food...

t_ch: 怪我，我没管理好卢卡选手的饮食，让他吃了不干净的训练餐。
t_en: I am to blame. I didn't watch Luka's diet properly, and he ate some bad food during training.

t_ch: 比赛前我看到他脸色发青，扶着墙从卫生间里走出来，人都快虚脱了。如果他的状态更好一些，区区几枚子弹，他徒手就能接下。
t_en: I saw that his face was sickly before the match. He was leaned against the wall when he came out from the toilet, like he was dehydrated. If he were in a better state, he would've easily countered those few measly bullets.

t_ch: 我也感觉卢卡选手没有发挥全部实力。
t_en: I also thought that Luka wasn't exerting his full power.

t_ch: 卢卡大意了，没有闪…
t_en: Luka got careless, and he didn't dodge...

t_ch: 波提欧选手不讲武德，一开场就使出了奥义。卢卡选手大意了，没有闪。
t_en: Boothill lacks martial ethics, using an esoteric move right out the gate. Luka got careless and didn't manage to dodge in time.

t_ch: 噢，原来是卢卡选手没有准备好…那么请问卢卡选手有准备什么奥义吗？
t_en: Oh, so Luka wasn't prepared... May I ask then, did Luka prepare any esoteric moves?
Uhh...

t_ch: 我只能说敬请期待。
t_en: Wait and see, is all I can say.

t_ch: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的回答。
t_en: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your answer.

t_ch: 目前很多观众都非常关心卢卡选手是否会参加接下来的复活赛，教练能透露一些相关消息吗？
t_en: Many spectators are very concerned if Luka will participate in the repechage. Can you give us a little insight on this?

t_ch: 取决于卢卡选手的状态…
t_en: That depends on Luka's condition...

t_ch: 目前我们还无法确定是否会参加复活赛，最终会取决于卢卡选手的状态。
t_en: We're still not sure if we will participate in the repechage. Ultimately, it boils down to Luka's condition.

t_ch: 不过请大家放心，我们一定会尽力重返赛场。
t_en: But everyone shouldn't worry. We will do our best to return to the ring.

t_ch: 那祝愿卢卡选手早日重返赛场。
t_en: I wish Luka a swift return to the tournament then.

t_ch: 我们正在积极备战…
t_en: We are already busy with the prep...

t_ch: 那当然啦。赛场上失去的东西，只能重新在赛场上夺回来。请大家期待我们在复活赛上的表现吧。
t_en: Of course. What was lost in the ring can only be regained by re-entering it. Please look forward to our performance in the repechage.

t_ch: 那祝卢卡选手能够成功「复活」。
t_en: I wish Luka a successful resurrection, then.

t_ch: 回家的船票已经买好了…
t_en: The ticket home has already been bought...

t_ch: 很遗憾，虽然我们都希望卢卡选手能够重新站上赛场。但事实上，这次失败对他的打击很大，他给我发消息说，他已经买好了返程的船票。
t_en: It's a pity, since we all hoped that Luka would be able to get another chance in the ring. Honestly though, this defeat was too much of a blow to him. He sent me a message saying that he has already bought the return ticket home.

t_ch: 不过我觉得事情还有转机，正在尽力对卢卡选手进行心理建设，希望他能及时振作起来。
t_en: But I think there's still a chance to flip this around. We are doing our best to provide psychological support for Luka — we hope he'll be able to recover in time.

t_ch: 辛苦{NICKNAME}教练，祝卢卡选手振作起来。
t_en: Please keep it up, Coach {NICKNAME}. We hope Luka will make it in time.

t_ch: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
t_en: All right. That's it for your questions.

t_ch: 前排左手边第二位。
t_en: Front row, second from the left.

t_ch: 请这位记者朋友提问。
t_en: Please ask your questions.

t_ch: 可能是视角原因，你应该没有注意到这位记者。不过，可能是出于好奇，可能是出于疲倦，你仍然选择了这位*空气记者*进行提问。
t_en: It could have been a problem with your line of sight, and you might not have noticed this journalist. But, perhaps out of curiosity, perhaps due to fatigue, you still point to this "invisible journalist" to ask their question.

t_ch: 人呢？没来就请下一位了！
t_en: Who's supposed to be here? I'll skip to the next one if there's no one here!

t_ch: 那我们跳过吧。
t_en: Let's skip then.

t_ch: 等等——我就在这里！
t_en: Hang on. I'm right here!

t_ch: 虎克似乎站得有些太过靠前，以至于除了记者那一侧的视角，根本没人看到她。
t_en: Hook seems to be standing a little too far in front, which explains why no one can see her from that angle, apart from the journalists' seat.

t_ch: 我、我代表贝洛伯格的《水晶日报》向你提问！
t_en: I—I have a question on behalf of Belobog's Crystal Daily!

t_ch: （流泪，擦下不存在的眼镜…）
t_en: (Tear up and wipe at your non-existent glasses...)

t_ch: 虎克懂事了啊，我好感动，费斯曼大叔你有看到吗？呜呜呜……
t_en: Hook is finally growing up. I'm so touched. Can you see this, Uncle Fersman? *sob*...

t_ch: 喂！别说的就像老爹不在了一样啊！
t_en: Hey! Stop talking like the old man's left this world!

t_ch: 《水晶日报》雇佣儿童记者？
t_en: The Crystal Daily employs child journalists?

t_ch: 没有人雇佣我，这算是我的假期作业，给《水晶日报》投稿。
t_en: No one hired me. This is my summer assignment: To submit articles for the Crystal Daily.

t_ch: 网上说「演武仪典都快成兵器展了，再这样下去歼星炮都要用上了」。
t_en: The internet says that "the Wardance is fast becoming an arms exhibition. At this rate, even star-destroyer cannons will get used."

t_ch: 请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价网上的这种观点？
t_en: Might I ask what Coach {NICKNAME} has to say about such opinions on the internet?

t_ch: 演武仪典也要与时俱进…
t_en: The Wardance also has to change with the times...

t_ch: 演武仪典也要与时俱进嘛，不管用什么武器，比赛打得精彩最重要。
t_en: The Wardance also has to keep up with the times. The array of arsenal used doesn't matter. What matters is that the matches are exciting.

t_ch: 如果完全遵循原教旨主义，那参赛选手要被筛掉一大半喽。
t_en: If we completely stick to the fundamentals, half the contestants would be deemed ineligible.

t_ch: 网友的话有道理啊…
t_en: The netizens speak sense...

t_ch: 你看，网友都明白的道理，组委会那帮家伙怎么就不明白呢。
t_en: Look, the netizens understand what's going on. Why those committee folks don't understand is beyond me.

t_ch: 如果演武仪典真有公平公正的精神，选手们应当禁止使用武器，完全依靠拳头进行战斗。
t_en: If the Wardance truly upheld the spirit of fair competition, contestants should be forbidden from using weapons, and rely solely on their fists to fight.

t_ch: 我不对比赛规则评价…
t_en: No comment on the tournament rules...

t_ch: 作为参赛方，我认为我们不适宜对比赛规则进行评价。我只能表示，比赛结果就是这样，而且我们接受它。
t_en: As a participant, I don't think it is appropriate for us to comment on the tournament's regulations. I can only say that this is the outcome of the match, and we accept the outcome.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练的见解，很有道理，但希望下次能让我也听明白！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding is very rational, but I hope I can also understand your words next time!

t_ch: 卢卡选手虽然输掉了比赛，但贝洛伯格会继续支持他，更多的朋友还会继续支持他。请{NICKNAME}教练为卢卡选手的粉丝说两句吧。
t_en: Luka may have lost the match, but Belobog will continue to cheer for him, and even more so his friends. Coach {NICKNAME}, please say something to Luka's fans on his behalf.

t_ch: （表达感动的情绪）
t_en: (Express gratitude)

t_ch: *感动到哽咽*
t_en: *Chokes dramatically*

t_ch: 虽然卢卡选手遇到了一点小小的挫折，但我相信只要有大家的支持，他一定能及时走出阴霾，谢谢大家，你们永远是卢卡最坚强的后盾！
t_en: Luka may have run into a small hiccup, but I believe that with everyone's support, he will surely bounce back. Thank you, everyone. You will forever be Luka's strongest support!
